nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 65, with temperatures rising to around 67 overnight. East wind around 5 mph.

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 90, with temperatures falling to around 88 in the afternoon. South southeast wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 10pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 69, with temperatures rising to around 72 overnight. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
